title: Short Swords Plus
description: Makes Swords Shorter for Better Experience In-Game and PvP.
body:
ShortSwordsPlus adds compact versions of every vanilla sword ⚔️. Wooden, Stone, Iron, Gold, Diamond, and Netherite swords are all shortened for a cleaner look and smoother combat. Perfect for players who want small sword models, better screen visibility, and a fresh aesthetic while keeping vanilla stats intact.
All credit goes to Battlezent 🙌

If you want it even shorter or more keyword-packed, I can make another version!
